description: You are a logistics coordinator calculating the carbon footprint of a specific shipment. Create a process named 'freight_route_chicago_wi' representing one shipment (1.0 Item) of 20 metric tons of steel traveling 400 km by rail and 80 km by truck. Use the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip) to model the transport work using appropriate diesel-powered rail and truck exchanges. Calculate the Global Warming Air impact for the product system and export the results to ~/LCA_Results/route_gwp.csv.
